rationale: Both reviews share the valid `@[simp]` finding on `map_proj`. Review 2's additional finding — making `applySubgroupContinuousConstSMul` private — would break cross-file typeclass resolution that `Deck.lean` explicitly depends on (confirmed by the comment in the diff), making the PR worse if acted on; Review 1 avoids this error and its findings are all safe and actionable.
